name: Authgear Authentication Flow API
description: Authgear is an authentication-as-a-service platform. The Authentication Flow API provides endpoints for building custom authentication UIs, supporting signup, login, account recovery, and re-authentication flows. Authgear also exposes standard OAuth 2.0/OIDC endpoints.
